en.strength: Strength in this scene: You are observant and often catch relational details that others miss.
en.cost: Cost to watch: If you stay quiet too long, others may assume you have no feeling or no view.
en.better_move: Look at environment variables before turning the result into a job-fit label.
en.micro_script: “I’ll verify the interaction load, feedback intensity, and recovery space before deciding whether this is sustainable.”
en.do_not_overread: This is a likely scene pattern, not a prediction of how you will respond every time.
en.why_this_matters: This scene helps test whether Quiet Feeler is only a score interpretation or a pattern that repeats in real interactions.
evidence_signals: Whose emotion you notice first in this situation.
Whether you can separate facts, feelings, and responsibility.
Whether you feel clearer afterward or keep replaying the exchange.
en.reflection_prompt: Think of the last similar moment: were you trying to protect the relationship, efficiency, yourself, or the other person first?
en.tiny_experiment: Next time, change only one move: pause first, reflect first, set a boundary first, or name your need first.
en.result_page_depth: Use in Reality Translation cards and Agent follow-up prompts.

zh-CN.title: 判断工作环境时：修复准备型的关键动作
zh-CN.typical_response: 你在评估岗位、团队节奏或长期协作方式时，你有修复意愿；本场景的重点是别只道歉，也要说清下一步怎么变。
zh-CN.strength: 这个模式的优势：你不回避核心问题。
zh-CN.cost: 容易付出的代价：没有修复时，直接会被误读成攻击或冷硬。
zh-CN.better_move: 看环境变量，不急着给自己贴“适合/不适合”的职业标签。
zh-CN.micro_script: “我先验证这个环境的人际密度、反馈强度和恢复空间，再判断是否适合长期投入。”
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是一个常见场景假设，不代表你每次都会这样反应。
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 这个场景能验证「修复准备型」是否只是分数解释，还是会在真实互动里反复出现。
evidence_signals: 你在这个场景里最先注意到谁的情绪。
你是否能区分事实、感受和责任。
事后你是更清楚，还是持续反刍。
zh-CN.reflection_prompt: 回想最近一次类似场景：你最先想保护的是关系、效率、自己，还是对方？
zh-CN.tiny_experiment: 下一次只改变一个动作：先暂停、先复述、先设边界，或先说清需要。
zh-CN.result_page_depth: Use in Reality Translation cards and Agent follow-up prompts.

en.title: Reading a work environment: the Repair Ready move
en.typical_response: when you are evaluating a role, team rhythm, or long-term collaboration pattern, you may be ready to repair; the work here is not only apologizing, but naming what changes next.
en.strength: Strength in this scene: You do not avoid the heart of the issue.
en.cost: Cost to watch: Without repair, directness can be read as attack or coldness.
en.better_move: Look at environment variables before turning the result into a job-fit label.
en.micro_script: “I’ll verify the interaction load, feedback intensity, and recovery space before deciding whether this is sustainable.”
en.do_not_overread: This is a likely scene pattern, not a prediction of how you will respond every time.
en.why_this_matters: This scene helps test whether Repair Ready is only a score interpretation or a pattern that repeats in real interactions.
evidence_signals: Whose emotion you notice first in this situation.
Whether you can separate facts, feelings, and responsibility.
Whether you feel clearer afterward or keep replaying the exchange.
en.reflection_prompt: Think of the last similar moment: were you trying to protect the relationship, efficiency, yourself, or the other person first?
en.tiny_experiment: Next time, change only one move: pause first, reflect first, set a boundary first, or name your need first.
en.result_page_depth: Use in Reality Translation cards and Agent follow-up prompts.

zh-CN.title: 判断工作环境时：过度伸手的帮助者的关键动作
zh-CN.typical_response: 你在评估岗位、团队节奏或长期协作方式时，你容易多帮一步；本场景的重点是把支持从“全包”改成“有限而清楚”。
zh-CN.strength: 这个模式的优势：别人容易感到你可靠、愿意支持。
zh-CN.cost: 容易付出的代价：你可能把帮助变成自动反应，忽视自己的时间、能量和边界。
zh-CN.better_move: 看环境变量，不急着给自己贴“适合/不适合”的职业标签。
zh-CN.micro_script: “我先验证这个环境的人际密度、反馈强度和恢复空间，再判断是否适合长期投入。”
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是一个常见场景假设，不代表你每次都会这样反应。
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 这个场景能验证「过度伸手的帮助者」是否只是分数解释，还是会在真实互动里反复出现。
evidence_signals: 你在这个场景里最先注意到谁的情绪。
你是否能区分事实、感受和责任。
事后你是更清楚，还是持续反刍。
zh-CN.reflection_prompt: 回想最近一次类似场景：你最先想保护的是关系、效率、自己，还是对方？
zh-CN.tiny_experiment: 下一次只改变一个动作：先暂停、先复述、先设边界，或先说清需要。
zh-CN.result_page_depth: Use in Reality Translation cards and Agent follow-up prompts.

en.title: Reading a work environment: the Overextended Helper move
en.typical_response: when you are evaluating a role, team rhythm, or long-term collaboration pattern, you may help one step too far; the work here is making support limited and clear instead of total.
en.strength: Strength in this scene: People may experience you as dependable and willing to support.
en.cost: Cost to watch: Helping can become automatic, pushing aside your time, energy, and limits.
en.better_move: Look at environment variables before turning the result into a job-fit label.
en.micro_script: “I’ll verify the interaction load, feedback intensity, and recovery space before deciding whether this is sustainable.”
en.do_not_overread: This is a likely scene pattern, not a prediction of how you will respond every time.
en.why_this_matters: This scene helps test whether Overextended Helper is only a score interpretation or a pattern that repeats in real interactions.

en.tiny_experiment: Next time, change only one move: pause first, reflect first, set a boundary first, or name your need first.

zh-CN.label: 人际密度：低
zh-CN.meaning: 互动频率、会议密度和需要读人的程度
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合需要先把任务做深、减少连续情绪切换的阶段。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 风险是关系信号不足时，你可能难以及时校准他人预期。
zh-CN.interview_question: 这个环境是否真的安静，还是只是把沟通延后到危机时？
role_observation_checklist: 看会议是否有明确目的和结束条件。
看反馈是否具体到行为，而不是停留在人身感受。
看团队是否允许人暂时退出高情绪对话。
zh-CN.team_risk: 如果这个变量被长期忽视，团队会把情绪成本转嫁给最愿意承担的人。
zh-CN.recovery_condition: 需要可预期的暂停、复盘和交接空间。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 这个环境是否真的安静，还是只是把沟通延后到危机时？
zh-CN.do_not_overread: This describes an environment variable, not a role recommendation.

en.label: Interpersonal density: low
en.meaning: the amount of interaction, meeting load, and people-reading required
en.fit_signal: Helpful when the work requires depth, fewer social switches, and more continuity.
en.strain_signal: The strain is that fewer relational cues can make expectation-setting slower.
en.interview_question: Is the environment genuinely quiet, or does it only postpone communication until there is a problem?
role_observation_checklist: Notice whether meetings have a clear purpose and ending point.
Notice whether feedback targets behavior rather than personal character.
Notice whether people can step out of emotionally loaded conversations when needed.
en.team_risk: If this variable is ignored, teams often shift emotional cost onto the person most willing to carry it.
en.recovery_condition: Requires predictable space for pause, review, and handoff.
en.what_to_verify: Is the environment genuinely quiet, or does it only postpone communication until there is a problem?
en.do_not_overread: This describes an environment variable, not a role recommendation.

meta.risk_notes: Do not map to specific occupations.

zh-CN.strain_signal: 风险是模糊边界让互动慢慢侵入恢复时间。

zh-CN.recovery_condition: 需要可预期的暂停、复盘和交接空间。

meta.deferred: formulation_overlays require resolver support and are intentionally left to a later PR.

zh-CN.title: 情绪命名练习
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 把模糊的不舒服拆成一个具体情绪词，而不是马上解释或压下去。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我先不急着判断对错。我现在更像是感到……”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我先不急着判断对错。我现在更像是感到……

seven_day_plan.practice: 写下今天最明显的一个情绪词。
把一个情绪拆成事实、感受、请求。
记录身体里最先出现的信号。
把“我很烦”改成更具体的词。
在一次对话后补写真实感受。
找出一个最常见触发点。
选一个下周继续使用的情绪词。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Name the Emotion
en.why_this_matters: Turn a vague discomfort into a specific emotion word before explaining it away or pushing it down.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I do not need to decide whether this is right or wrong yet. What I notice first is...”
en.script: I do not need to decide whether this is right or wrong yet. What I notice first is...

seven_day_plan.practice: Write down the clearest emotion word you felt today.
Separate one moment into fact, feeling, and request.
Notice the first body signal that showed up.
Replace “I’m annoyed” with a more precise word.
After one conversation, write the feeling you did not say.
Find one recurring trigger.
Choose one emotion word to keep using next week.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 暂停与恢复
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 在被触发后先创造几秒钟空间，让回应不完全由第一反应决定。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我想停一下再回答，这样我能说得更清楚。”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我想停一下再回答，这样我能说得更清楚。

seven_day_plan.practice: 选一个触发词，练习十秒暂停。
延迟回复一条不紧急消息。
用一次深呼气结束第一反应。
说出“我需要想一下”。
记录暂停前后语气差异。
复盘一次没停住的场景。
选出最有效的恢复动作。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Pause and Recover
en.why_this_matters: Create a few seconds of space after being triggered, so your response is not decided by the first impulse.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I want to pause before I answer, so I can respond more clearly.”
en.script: I want to pause before I answer, so I can respond more clearly.

seven_day_plan.practice: Choose one trigger word and practice a ten-second pause.
Delay one non-urgent reply.
Use one long exhale to end the first impulse.
Say, “I need a moment to think.”
Compare your tone before and after pausing.
Review one moment when you did not pause.
Choose the reset step that worked best.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 反馈减压
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 把反馈里的事实、情绪和下一步拆开，避免把别人的语气全部当成自我否定。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我先确认一下：你最希望我调整的是结果、过程，还是沟通方式？”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我先确认一下：你最希望我调整的是结果、过程，还是沟通方式？

seven_day_plan.practice: 回顾一次反馈，写下事实部分。
单独写下反馈里的情绪语气。
列出对方真正要求你改的一个点。
用脚本问一次澄清问题。
把自我否定改成行动清单。
记录反馈后恢复所需时间。
总结你下次先听哪一层。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Decompress Feedback
en.why_this_matters: Separate facts, tone, and next steps so the other person’s emotion does not become your self-judgment.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “Let me check: are you asking me to adjust the outcome, the process, or the way I communicated?”
en.script: Let me check: are you asking me to adjust the outcome, the process, or the way I communicated?

seven_day_plan.practice: Review one piece of feedback and write the factual part.
Write the emotional tone separately.
Name the one change the person actually asked for.
Use the script to ask one clarifying question.
Turn self-criticism into one action item.
Track how long it took to recover from the feedback.
Summarize which layer you will listen for first next time.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 共情后的边界
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 理解别人之后，明确你能支持什么、不能替对方承担什么。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我理解这件事对你很重。我可以陪你理清下一步，但不能替你承接全部压力。”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我理解这件事对你很重。我可以陪你理清下一步，但不能替你承接全部压力。

seven_day_plan.practice: 列出一次你替别人承担的事。
区分陪伴、建议和负责。
练习一句边界脚本。
只承诺一个具体支持动作。
观察说边界后的身体反应。
复盘边界是否真的伤害关系。
选出下周不再自动接管的场景。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Empathy with a Boundary
en.why_this_matters: After understanding someone, clarify what you can support and what you cannot carry for them.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I can see this is heavy for you. I can help you sort the next step, but I cannot carry the whole weight for you.”
en.script: I can see this is heavy for you. I can help you sort the next step, but I cannot carry the whole weight for you.

seven_day_plan.practice: List one recent moment when you carried someone else’s load.
Separate companionship, advice, and responsibility.
Practice one boundary sentence.
Commit to only one specific support action.
Notice your body after stating a boundary.
Review whether the boundary actually harmed the relationship.
Choose one situation next week where you will not automatically take over.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 冲突后的修复
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 把“我不是故意的”升级成“我看见了影响，并愿意修复”。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“刚才我的表达可能让你觉得被否定了。我想重新说一次，并先听听你听到了什么。”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 刚才我的表达可能让你觉得被否定了。我想重新说一次，并先听听你听到了什么。

seven_day_plan.practice: 写下一次关系紧张中的实际影响。
把“我不是故意”改成“我看见影响”。
向一个小误会练习修复句。
确认对方听到的版本。
补一个具体修正动作。
复盘修复后关系是否更清楚。
写下你最常跳过的修复步骤。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Repair After Impact
en.why_this_matters: Move from “I did not mean it” to “I see the impact and I want to repair it.”
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “What I said may have landed as dismissive. I want to try again, and first I want to hear how it landed for you.”
en.script: What I said may have landed as dismissive. I want to try again, and first I want to hear how it landed for you.

seven_day_plan.practice: Write the real impact of one tense moment.
Replace “I didn’t mean it” with “I see the impact.”
Practice one repair line after a small misunderstanding.
Ask what the other person heard.
Add one concrete corrective action.
Review whether repair made the relationship clearer.
Name the repair step you usually skip.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 不升级的表达
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 把真实表达从攻击、证明或压制里分离出来。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我想说清楚我的感受，但不是为了压过你。我的重点是……”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我想说清楚我的感受，但不是为了压过你。我的重点是……

seven_day_plan.practice: 围绕“不升级的表达”做一次真实场景观察。
写下这个练习最容易出现的触发点。
试用脚本中的第一句话。
把一次对话拆成事实、情绪和下一步。
做一个小边界或小修复动作。
复盘做得不完美但有进步的地方。
选出下周继续练的一句话。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。

en.title: Express Without Escalating
en.why_this_matters: Separate honest expression from attacking, proving, or overpowering.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I want to be clear about my experience, not to overpower yours. The point I want to make is...”
en.script: I want to be clear about my experience, not to overpower yours. The point I want to make is...

seven_day_plan.practice: Observe one real situation connected to Express Without Escalating.
Write down the trigger that shows up most often.
Try the first sentence of the script once.
Split one conversation into facts, feelings, and next action.
Make one small boundary or repair move.
Review one imperfect but improved attempt.
Choose one sentence to keep practicing next week.

en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.

zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我可以帮你一起理清选择，但决定和后果还是需要由你来拿。”这句话。

en.script: I can help you think through the options, but the decision and the consequences need to stay with you.

zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“听起来这件事让你很失望。我们可以一起看下一步怎么处理。”这句话。

en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “It sounds like this was really disappointing. We can look at the next step together.”
en.script: It sounds like this was really disappointing. We can look at the next step together.

en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I need ten minutes to reset before we continue this conversation.”
en.script: I need ten minutes to reset before we continue this conversation.

en.title: Reflect Before Retesting
en.why_this_matters: Before retesting, review your pace, hesitation points, and any unusually concentrated answers.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I will hold this result lightly and retake it when I am in a steadier state.”
en.script: I will hold this result lightly and retake it when I am in a steadier state.

seven_day_plan.practice: Observe one real situation connected to Reflect Before Retesting.
Write down the trigger that shows up most often.
Try the first sentence of the script once.
Split one conversation into facts, feelings, and next action.
Make one small boundary or repair move.
Review one imperfect but improved attempt.
Choose one sentence to keep practicing next week.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 先问再解决
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 在提供建议前确认对方想要理解、建议还是只是被听见。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“你现在更想让我听你说，还是一起想办法？”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 你现在更想让我听你说，还是一起想办法？

seven_day_plan.practice: 围绕“先问再解决”做一次真实场景观察。
写下这个练习最容易出现的触发点。
试用脚本中的第一句话。
把一次对话拆成事实、情绪和下一步。
做一个小边界或小修复动作。
复盘做得不完美但有进步的地方。
选出下周继续练的一句话。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Ask Before Solving
en.why_this_matters: Before offering advice, ask whether the person wants understanding, ideas, or simply to be heard.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “Do you want me to just listen right now, or would it help to think through options together?”
en.script: Do you want me to just listen right now, or would it help to think through options together?

en.title: Values Trigger Pause

zh-CN.title: 修复但不自责
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 承认影响，不把整个自我都判成失败。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一个动作：在一个低风险场景里使用“我看到这句话影响了你。我会修正表达，但我也想具体看哪里需要改。”这句话。
zh-CN.script: 我看到这句话影响了你。我会修正表达，但我也想具体看哪里需要改。

seven_day_plan.practice: 围绕“修复但不自责”做一次真实场景观察。
写下这个练习最容易出现的触发点。
试用脚本中的第一句话。
把一次对话拆成事实、情绪和下一步。
做一个小边界或小修复动作。
复盘做得不完美但有进步的地方。
选出下周继续练的一句话。

zh-CN.common_failure: 最常见失败不是不会做，而是等到情绪已经很满才想起来做。
zh-CN.repair_move: 如果没做到，不要重开整套计划；只复盘一个触发点和下一次第一句话。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习变成要求自己完美稳定。先追求多一次停顿、多一句清楚表达。

en.title: Repair Without Self-Blame
en.why_this_matters: Acknowledge the impact without turning your whole self into the problem.
en.do_today: Today, use one low-risk version of this sentence: “I see that what I said affected you. I will adjust it, and I want to understand the specific part to change.”
en.script: I see that what I said affected you. I will adjust it, and I want to understand the specific part to change.

seven_day_plan.practice: Observe one real situation connected to Repair Without Self-Blame.
Write down the trigger that shows up most often.
Try the first sentence of the script once.
Split one conversation into facts, feelings, and next action.
Make one small boundary or repair move.
Review one imperfect but improved attempt.
Choose one sentence to keep practicing next week.

en.common_failure: The common failure is not lack of knowledge. It is remembering the tool only after the emotion is already high.
en.repair_move: If you miss it, do not restart the whole plan. Review one trigger and one first sentence for next time.
en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into a demand to be perfectly steady. Aim for one extra pause or one clearer sentence.

meta.risk_notes: Practice guidance only; no outcome promise.

zh-CN.title: 跨测评上下文边界
zh-CN.summary: 这一模块只说明你还完成过哪些相关测评，以及这些测评可以如何辅助阅读 EQ 结果。
zh-CN.how_to_use: 把 MBTI、大五人格或九型人格看作不同问题的证据来源：它们不能改写 EQ 分数，也不能替代情绪与关系自我报告。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不用于职业预测、招聘筛选、临床诊断、固定人格标签或情商能力宣称。

en.title: Cross-assessment context boundary
en.summary: This module only explains which related assessments are available and how they can support reading the EQ result.
en.how_to_use: Treat MBTI, Big Five, and Enneagram as evidence from different questions. They do not rewrite EQ scores or replace the emotional and relational self-report result.
en.claim_boundary: Not for career prediction, hiring, clinical diagnosis, fixed identity labels, or emotional ability claims.

zh-CN.title: EQ 和 MBTI 怎么一起看
zh-CN.summary: MBTI 更像偏好和信息处理风格；EQ 报告更关注你在情绪、反馈、冲突和关系修复中的自我感知。两者可以互相补充，但不要混成一个总分。
zh-CN.how_to_use: MBTI 更像偏好和信息处理风格；EQ 报告更关注你在情绪、反馈、冲突和关系修复中的自我感知。两者可以互相补充，但不要混成一个总分。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不根据 MBTI 类型推断情商高低、工作表现、职业适配或关系成败。

en.title: How EQ and MBTI work together
en.summary: MBTI is closer to preference and information-processing style. This EQ report focuses on self-perceived patterns in emotion, feedback, conflict, and repair. They can complement each other, but should not be merged into one score.
en.how_to_use: MBTI is closer to preference and information-processing style. This EQ report focuses on self-perceived patterns in emotion, feedback, conflict, and repair. They can complement each other, but should not be merged into one score.
en.claim_boundary: Do not infer EQ level, job performance, career fit, or relationship outcomes from MBTI type.

zh-CN.title: EQ 和大五人格怎么一起看
zh-CN.summary: 大五更稳定地描述人格倾向；EQ 报告更关注情绪与关系场景中的可练习策略。大五解释“倾向”，EQ 提供“下一步怎么做”。
zh-CN.how_to_use: 大五更稳定地描述人格倾向；EQ 报告更关注情绪与关系场景中的可练习策略。大五解释“倾向”，EQ 提供“下一步怎么做”。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不把大五特质转写为临床结论、招聘结论或固定人格优劣判断。

en.title: How EQ and Big Five work together
en.summary: Big Five describes broader personality tendencies. This EQ report focuses on trainable strategies in emotional and relational situations. Big Five explains tendencies; EQ helps choose the next practice.
en.how_to_use: Big Five describes broader personality tendencies. This EQ report focuses on trainable strategies in emotional and relational situations. Big Five explains tendencies; EQ helps choose the next practice.
en.claim_boundary: Do not turn Big Five traits into clinical conclusions, hiring decisions, or fixed judgments of personality quality.

zh-CN.title: EQ 和九型人格怎么一起看
zh-CN.summary: 九型更关注动机和防御模式；EQ 报告更关注你如何识别、调节、回应和修复情绪关系。一个解释内在驱动，一个帮助处理具体场景。
zh-CN.how_to_use: 九型更关注动机和防御模式；EQ 报告更关注你如何识别、调节、回应和修复情绪关系。一个解释内在驱动，一个帮助处理具体场景。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不根据九型类型推断治疗需要、招聘适配、职业成功或关系结局。

en.title: How EQ and Enneagram work together
en.summary: Enneagram focuses more on motivation and defensive patterns. This EQ report focuses on how you identify, regulate, respond, and repair in emotional-relational situations. One explains inner drivers; the other helps with specific moments.
en.how_to_use: Enneagram focuses more on motivation and defensive patterns. This EQ report focuses on how you identify, regulate, respond, and repair in emotional-relational situations. One explains inner drivers; the other helps with specific moments.
en.claim_boundary: Do not infer treatment needs, hiring fit, career success, or relationship outcomes from Enneagram type.

zh-CN.title: MBTI 与 自我觉察：low
zh-CN.summary: MBTI 可以帮助你理解表达风格或兴趣背景，EQ 的 自我觉察 则解释情绪与关系信号。
zh-CN.how_to_use: 把它们放在一起看时，只用于提出更好的自我观察问题。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不要用跨测评组合判断职业、健康或关系结局。
zh-CN.connection: MBTI 可以帮助你理解表达风格或兴趣背景，EQ 的 自我觉察 则解释情绪与关系信号。
zh-CN.difference: 两者不能互相替代，也不能合成一个确定性结论。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 不要用跨测评组合判断职业、健康或关系结局。

en.title: MBTI and self-awareness: low
en.summary: MBTI can help describe style or interest context; EQ self-awareness explains emotional and relational signals.
en.how_to_use: Use the combination to ask better reflection questions, not to force a single answer.
en.claim_boundary: Do not use cross-assessment combinations to decide roles, health, or relationship outcomes.
en.connection: MBTI can help describe style or interest context; EQ self-awareness explains emotional and relational signals.
en.difference: They are not interchangeable and should not be fused into a deterministic conclusion.
en.do_not_overread: Do not use cross-assessment combinations to decide roles, health, or relationship outcomes.

en.how_to_use: Use the combination to ask better reflection questions, not to force a single answer.
en.claim_boundary: Do not use cross-assessment combinations to decide roles, health, or relationship outcomes.
en.connection: Big Five can help describe style or interest context; EQ self-awareness explains emotional and relational signals.
en.difference: They are not interchangeable and should not be fused into a deterministic conclusion.
en.do_not_overread: Do not use cross-assessment combinations to decide roles, health, or relationship outcomes.

zh-CN.question: 什么是 EQ？
zh-CN.answer: EQ 指情绪与关系相关的自我觉察、调节、共情和关系处理方式。费马 EQ-60 用自我报告方式帮助你理解这些模式。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: FAQ 是教育性说明，不是个人结论。

en.question: What is EQ?
en.answer: EQ refers to emotional and relational patterns such as self-awareness, regulation, empathy, and relationship management. Fermat EQ-60 uses self-report to help you understand these patterns.
en.do_not_overread: FAQ answers are educational, not personal conclusions.

zh-CN.question: 这个 EQ 测试测什么？
zh-CN.answer: 它测你如何看待自己的情绪与关系模式，包括自我觉察、情绪调节、共情理解和关系管理。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: FAQ 是教育性说明，不是个人结论。

en.question: What does this EQ test measure?
en.answer: It measures how you perceive your emotional and relational tendencies across self-awareness, emotion regulation, empathy, and relationship management.
en.do_not_overread: FAQ answers are educational, not personal conclusions.

zh-CN.question: 它是不是现场表现测量？
zh-CN.answer: 不是。EQ-60 是自我报告结果，解释你如何看待自己的情绪与关系模式，不等同于受控任务中的现场表现。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: FAQ 是教育性说明，不是个人结论。

en.question: Is this based on real-time performance?
en.answer: No. EQ-60 is a self-report result. It describes how you see your emotional and relational patterns, not how you would perform in a controlled task.
en.do_not_overread: FAQ answers are educational, not personal conclusions.

zh-CN.question: 和专业能力工具有什么区别？
zh-CN.answer: 专业能力工具通常需要受控任务、专门评分和资格管理。EQ-60 更适合自我理解和成长规划。

en.question: How is it different from professional ability instruments?
en.answer: Professional ability instruments use controlled tasks, specialized scoring, and qualification procedures. EQ-60 is for reflection and growth planning.
en.do_not_overread: FAQ answers are educational, not personal conclusions.

zh-CN.question: EQ 和 IQ 有什么区别？
zh-CN.answer: IQ 更关注认知问题解决；EQ-60 关注你如何感知、调节和处理情绪与关系。两者不是互相替代。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: FAQ 是教育性说明，不是个人结论。

en.question: How is EQ different from IQ?
en.answer: IQ focuses more on cognitive problem solving. EQ-60 focuses on how you perceive, regulate, and handle emotion and relationships. They are not substitutes for each other.
en.do_not_overread: FAQ answers are educational, not personal conclusions.

zh-CN.question: EQ 和 MBTI 有什么区别？
zh-CN.answer: MBTI 更像偏好类型语言；EQ-60 解释情绪和关系功能。两者可互补，但不能互相替代。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: FAQ 是教育性说明，不是个人结论。

en.question: How is EQ different from MBTI?
en.answer: MBTI is more of a preference-type language. EQ-60 explains emotional and relational functioning. They can complement each other but do not replace each other.

zh-CN.question: EQ 和 Big Five 有什么区别？

zh-CN.question: 为什么用自我报告？
zh-CN.answer: 自我感知会影响你如何回应反馈、冲突和关系压力。它不是全部证据，但非常适合作为入口。

en.question: Why self-report?
en.answer: Self-perception affects how you respond to feedback, conflict, and relational pressure. It is not the whole picture, but it is a useful entry point.

zh-CN.question: 可以用于人事决定吗？

en.question: What is emotional labor in this report?

zh-CN.question: 为什么共情和边界要一起看？

en.question: Why do empathy and boundaries appear together?
en.answer: Empathy helps you understand another person. Boundaries help you decide what is yours to carry and what belongs to the situation or the other person.
en.do_not_overread: FAQ answers are educational, not personal conclusions.

zh-CN.question: 为什么我容易把反馈听成否定？
zh-CN.answer: 有些人会先接收到反馈里的情绪语气，再处理实际要求。练习重点是分开语气、事实和下一步。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: FAQ 是教育性说明，不是个人结论。

en.question: Why do I take feedback personally?
en.answer: Some people register the emotional tone of feedback before the practical request. The practice is to separate tone, fact, and next action.
en.do_not_overread: FAQ answers are educational, not personal conclusions.

zh-CN.question: 为什么我会回避冲突？
zh-CN.answer: 回避冲突可能是在保护关系或保护自己；当问题长期没被处理时，它才会变成成本。

en.question: Why do I avoid conflict?

zh-CN.title: 未来情境判断模块
zh-CN.description: 你现在看到的是自我报告结果。未来的情境判断模块会补充你在反馈、冲突、边界和压力场景中倾向选择的回应。
zh-CN.what_it_adds: 未来补充情境选择信息。
zh-CN.what_it_is_not: 当前未开放，不是 MSCEIT，也不是认证测评。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 当前没有开放题库、入口或综合报告。

en.title: Future scenario module
en.description: You are seeing a self-report result. A future scenario module will add how you tend to choose responses in feedback, conflict, boundary, and pressure situations.
en.what_it_adds: It supplements self-report with future scenario choices.
en.what_it_is_not: It is not live, not MSCEIT, and not a certified assessment.
en.do_not_overread: There is no public item bank, entry point, or integrated report yet.

zh-CN.title: 它会补充什么
zh-CN.description: 它会补充情境选择、压力下回应、边界和修复策略等信息，帮助形成自我感知 × 情境选择的综合报告。
zh-CN.what_it_adds: 未来补充情境选择信息。
zh-CN.what_it_is_not: 当前未开放，不是 MSCEIT，也不是认证测评。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 当前没有开放题库、入口或综合报告。

en.title: What it will add
en.description: It will add response choices, pressure reactions, boundary patterns, and repair strategies, supporting an integrated self-perception × scenario-choice report.
en.what_it_adds: It supplements self-report with future scenario choices.
en.what_it_is_not: It is not live, not MSCEIT, and not a certified assessment.
en.do_not_overread: There is no public item bank, entry point, or integrated report yet.

zh-CN.title: 它不是什么
zh-CN.description: 它不是受控专业能力工具，不提供资格凭证，不用于高风险判断。
zh-CN.what_it_adds: 未来补充情境选择信息。
zh-CN.what_it_is_not: 当前未开放，不是 MSCEIT，也不是认证测评。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 当前没有开放题库、入口或综合报告。

en.title: What it is not
en.description: It is not a controlled professional ability instrument, does not provide a credential, and is not for high-stakes decisions.
en.what_it_adds: It supplements self-report with future scenario choices.
en.what_it_is_not: It is not live, not MSCEIT, and not a certified assessment.
en.do_not_overread: There is no public item bank, entry point, or integrated report yet.

zh-CN.title: 未来综合报告
zh-CN.description: 未来综合报告会比较你如何看待自己，以及你在情境中倾向如何选择，从而显示一致处和差距。
zh-CN.what_it_adds: 未来补充情境选择信息。
zh-CN.what_it_is_not: 当前未开放，不是 MSCEIT，也不是认证测评。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 当前没有开放题库、入口或综合报告。

en.title: Future integrated report
en.description: The future integrated report will compare how you see yourself with how you tend to choose in scenarios, showing alignment and gaps.
en.what_it_adds: It supplements self-report with future scenario choices.
en.what_it_is_not: It is not live, not MSCEIT, and not a certified assessment.
en.do_not_overread: There is no public item bank, entry point, or integrated report yet.

zh-CN.title: 暂未开放说明
zh-CN.description: 该模块仍在 planned 状态。前端不应提供可点击开始入口。

en.title: Unavailable note
en.description: This module remains planned. The frontend should not provide a clickable start entry.
en.what_it_adds: It supplements self-report with future scenario choices.
en.what_it_is_not: It is not live, not MSCEIT, and not a certified assessment.
en.do_not_overread: There is no public item bank, entry point, or integrated report yet.

zh-CN.headline: 均衡整合型
zh-CN.core_judgment: 你能同时照顾自己的状态、他人的感受和关系目标。
zh-CN.evidence_point: 依据四维分数、维度差距、答题质量和机制组合生成。
three_sentence_summary: 你能同时照顾自己的状态、他人的感受和关系目标。
你能把情绪、关系和任务放在同一个画面里思考。
下一步：把“我来稳住”改成“我们一起定规则”。
zh-CN.top_strength: 你能把情绪、关系和任务放在同一个画面里思考。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 别人可能默认你来稳定局面，久了会变成隐形情绪劳动。
zh-CN.minimal_action: 把“我来稳住”改成“我们一起定规则”。
zh-CN.share_safe_sentence: 我能稳定关系，但不必独自维护整个关系系统。
zh-CN.continue_path: 保存报告，7 天后复测；也可以用 Agent 追问一个具体场景。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 首屏只给核心阅读路径，不替代完整报告。

en.headline: Balanced Integrator
en.core_judgment: You can hold your own state, other people, and the relationship goal in view at the same time.
en.evidence_point: Based on the four dimension scores, score gaps, response quality, and mechanism pattern.
three_sentence_summary: You can hold your own state, other people, and the relationship goal in view at the same time.
You can keep emotion, relationship, and task in the same frame.
Next move: Move from “I will steady this” to “we need a shared rule.”
en.top_strength: You can keep emotion, relationship, and task in the same frame.
en.likely_cost: Others may quietly expect you to stabilize the room, turning your steadiness into hidden labor.
en.minimal_action: Move from “I will steady this” to “we need a shared rule.”
en.share_safe_sentence: I can steady a relationship without maintaining the whole system alone.
en.continue_path: Save the report, retest later, or ask the Agent about one real scene.
en.do_not_overread: The first screen is a reading path, not a replacement for the full report.

zh-CN.headline: 高共情，低恢复
zh-CN.core_judgment: 你很快读到别人的状态，但恢复系统常常追不上共情速度。
zh-CN.evidence_point: 依据四维分数、维度差距、答题质量和机制组合生成。
three_sentence_summary: 你很快读到别人的状态，但恢复系统常常追不上共情速度。
你容易让别人感到被理解，尤其在情绪强烈的时刻。
下一步：练习“理解但不接管”，让共情后面跟着边界。
zh-CN.top_strength: 你容易让别人感到被理解，尤其在情绪强烈的时刻。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 你可能把别人的压力带回自己身上，离开场景后还在消化。
zh-CN.minimal_action: 练习“理解但不接管”，让共情后面跟着边界。
zh-CN.share_safe_sentence: 我可以理解别人，但不必替别人承受全部情绪。
zh-CN.continue_path: 保存报告，7 天后复测；也可以用 Agent 追问一个具体场景。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 首屏只给核心阅读路径，不替代完整报告。

en.headline: High Empathy, Slow Recovery
en.core_judgment: You read the room quickly, but recovery can lag behind empathy.
en.evidence_point: Based on the four dimension scores, score gaps, response quality, and mechanism pattern.
three_sentence_summary: You read the room quickly, but recovery can lag behind empathy.
You can make people feel understood, especially when emotions run high.
Next move: Practice understanding without taking over, so empathy is followed by boundary.
en.top_strength: You can make people feel understood, especially when emotions run high.
en.likely_cost: You may carry other people’s pressure with you long after the moment ends.
en.minimal_action: Practice understanding without taking over, so empathy is followed by boundary.
en.share_safe_sentence: I can understand someone without carrying the whole emotional load.
en.continue_path: Save the report, retest later, or ask the Agent about one real scene.
en.do_not_overread: The first screen is a reading path, not a replacement for the full report.

zh-CN.headline: 有觉察，调节不足
zh-CN.core_judgment: 你常知道自己怎么了，但把自己带回来需要更长时间。

three_sentence_summary: 你常知道自己怎么了，但把自己带回来需要更长时间。
你能清楚识别触发点、感受和需要。
下一步：把觉察压缩成一个暂停动作，而不是继续解释。
zh-CN.top_strength: 你能清楚识别触发点、感受和需要。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 越清楚自己被触发，越可能陷入反复分析或即时反应。
zh-CN.minimal_action: 把觉察压缩成一个暂停动作，而不是继续解释。
zh-CN.share_safe_sentence: 我知道自己怎么了，下一步是把自己带回来。

en.headline: Aware, Still Reactive
en.core_judgment: You often know what is happening inside, but the reset button is slower than the insight.
en.evidence_point: Based on the four dimension scores, score gaps, response quality, and mechanism pattern.
three_sentence_summary: You often know what is happening inside, but the reset button is slower than the insight.
You can identify triggers, feelings, and needs with unusual clarity.
Next move: Turn awareness into one pause action instead of another layer of explanation.
en.top_strength: You can identify triggers, feelings, and needs with unusual clarity.
en.likely_cost: The clearer the trigger feels, the easier it can be to over-analyze or react too soon.
en.minimal_action: Turn awareness into one pause action instead of another layer of explanation.

zh-CN.headline: 冷静稳定，但距离感强
zh-CN.core_judgment: 你能稳住事情，但别人不一定感到被情绪上接住。
zh-CN.evidence_point: 依据四维分数、维度差距、答题质量和机制组合生成。
three_sentence_summary: 你能稳住事情，但别人不一定感到被情绪上接住。
你不容易被情绪推着走，能保留判断和节奏。
下一步：先回应一句感受，再给建议或方案。
zh-CN.top_strength: 你不容易被情绪推着走，能保留判断和节奏。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 关系里的人可能觉得你有答案，但没有真正回应他们。
zh-CN.minimal_action: 先回应一句感受，再给建议或方案。
zh-CN.share_safe_sentence: 我能稳住事情，也要让人感到被看见。

en.headline: Steady, Less Attuned
en.core_judgment: You can steady the situation, but people may not always feel emotionally met.
en.evidence_point: Based on the four dimension scores, score gaps, response quality, and mechanism pattern.
three_sentence_summary: You can steady the situation, but people may not always feel emotionally met.
You are less likely to be pushed around by emotion and can keep judgment and pace.
Next move: Acknowledge one feeling before offering advice or a solution.
en.top_strength: You are less likely to be pushed around by emotion and can keep judgment and pace.
en.likely_cost: People may feel that you have answers without feeling that you have responded to them.
en.minimal_action: Acknowledge one feeling before offering advice or a solution.
en.share_safe_sentence: I can steady the situation and still help people feel seen.

zh-CN.headline: 关系优先，自我后置

zh-CN.top_strength: 你敏感于关系气氛，愿意让互动维持可进行。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 你可能很晚才意识到自己其实不愿意、不同意或已经累了。

en.headline: Relationship First, Self Later
en.core_judgment: You protect the relationship first and find your own position later.

three_sentence_summary: You protect the relationship first and find your own position later.

zh-CN.headline: 自我清楚，修复不足

zh-CN.what_to_hold_lightly: 不要把本次 formulation 当成强结论。

zh-CN.title: 为什么这个结果可信
zh-CN.body: 这份报告同时看四个维度、维度之间的差距、答题质量和内容路线。它不是只用一个总分判断你。
bullets: 四维信号：SA / ER / EM / RM
差距信号：最强维度与发展杠杆
质量信号：本次结果的解释置信度
路线信号：最相关场景和行动处方

en.title: Why this result is interpretable
en.body: This report looks at the four dimensions, the gaps between them, response quality, and the selected content route. It does not reduce you to one score.
bullets: Dimension signals: SA / ER / EM / RM
Gap signals: strongest dimension and development lever
Route signal: relevant scenes and action prescription

zh-CN.title: 30 秒读法
zh-CN.body: 先记住一句核心模式，再看一个证据点，最后只选一个行动。不要一口气把整份报告当成性格判决。

en.title: How to read this in 30 seconds
en.body: Remember one core pattern, check one evidence point, then choose one action. Do not treat the whole report as a verdict on your personality.

zh-CN.title: 现实验证法
zh-CN.body: 未来一周观察三件事：你最先读到谁的情绪、你是否能说清边界、你事后恢复需要多久。

en.title: Reality check
en.body: For the next week, observe three things: whose emotion you notice first, whether you can state a boundary, and how long recovery takes afterward.

change_flow: validate retrieval tags and forbidden claims

scientific_contract.allowed_use: Explain what the EQ-60 report can and cannot support.
scientific_contract.blocked_use: Do not turn boundaries into a diagnosis, hiring recommendation, or ability claim.

score_system.allowed_use: Explain score labels, dimensions, percentile language, and band meaning.
score_system.blocked_use: Do not rank the user as globally superior or inferior.

core_formulation.allowed_use: Explain the selected backend formulation and its evidence basis.
core_formulation.blocked_use: Do not invent a new formulation or override the backend-selected one.

mechanism.allowed_use: Explain one or two backend-selected interaction mechanisms.
mechanism.blocked_use: Do not display every mechanism or imply hidden diagnostic certainty.

reality_scene.allowed_use: Translate the report into user-selected daily scenes.
reality_scene.blocked_use: Do not make claims about another person's motives or pathology.

career_environment.allowed_use: Discuss work-environment variables, interview questions, and observation checklists.
career_environment.blocked_use: Do not recommend or exclude concrete jobs from EQ alone.

action_prescription.allowed_use: Suggest the backend-selected practice, script, and short practice plan.
action_prescription.blocked_use: Do not present practices as therapy or guaranteed outcomes.

quality_confidence.allowed_use: Explain confidence and retest guidance without blame.
quality_confidence.blocked_use: Do not accuse the user or force a strong profile when quality is low.

psychometric_evidence.allowed_use: Explain current evidence status and future validation steps.
psychometric_evidence.blocked_use: Do not imply completed external validation beyond the asset status.

conversion_action.allowed_use: Route to free save, share, revisit, related tests, or Agent entry actions.
conversion_action.blocked_use: Do not create purchase, unlock, premium, or SKU language.

sjt_bridge.allowed_use: Explain that EQ-SJT is planned and currently unavailable.
sjt_bridge.blocked_use: Do not offer a clickable SJT entry or describe it as an ability test.

cross_assessment_context.allowed_use: Explain how EQ can be read alongside MBTI, Big Five, and Enneagram.
cross_assessment_context.blocked_use: Do not fuse multiple assessments into one unsupported total score.

zh-CN.label: 理解我的结果
zh-CN.agent_goal: 帮助用户看懂后端已选择的核心 formulation、证据点和发展杠杆。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我会先按报告里的核心判断解释，不会重新打分或替换你的结果。

en.label: Understand my result
en.agent_goal: Help the user understand the backend-selected formulation, evidence, and development lever.
en.safe_opening: I will explain the core judgment already in your report; I will not rescore or replace it.

zh-CN.label: 为什么是这个结果
zh-CN.agent_goal: 解释分数、维度、机制和置信度如何支持当前报告。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我可以解释这份报告用了哪些分数和质量信号，但不会把它说成客观能力证明。

en.label: Why did I get this result?
en.agent_goal: Explain how scores, dimensions, mechanisms, and confidence support the current report.
en.safe_opening: I can explain the score and quality signals behind the report without treating them as objective ability proof.

zh-CN.label: 我下一步怎么练
zh-CN.agent_goal: 把后端选中的行动处方转成一个短、可执行的练习计划。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我会基于报告里的行动处方给你一个练习方式，不会把它当作治疗方案。

en.label: What should I practice next?
en.agent_goal: Turn the backend-selected action prescription into a short, practical practice path.
en.safe_opening: I will use the action prescription in your report as practice guidance, not as treatment.

zh-CN.label: 我适合什么工作环境
zh-CN.agent_goal: 只讨论职业环境变量、验证问题和观察清单，不推荐具体职业。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我可以帮你看哪些工作环境变量值得验证，但不会用 EQ 结果直接决定职业适配。

en.label: What work environment fits me?
en.agent_goal: Discuss work-environment variables, verification questions, and observation checklists without recommending specific jobs.
en.safe_opening: I can help you examine work-environment variables, but I will not decide job fit from EQ alone.

zh-CN.label: 关系或冲突怎么处理
zh-CN.agent_goal: 围绕一个具体场景调用现实转译和行动处方。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我们可以先选一个具体场景处理；如果涉及安全风险，我会先建议你寻求现实支持。

en.label: Help with a relationship or conflict
en.agent_goal: Use reality translation and action prescription assets for one specific scene.
en.safe_opening: We can focus on one concrete scene first; if safety risk is involved, I will point you to real support.

zh-CN.label: 为什么置信度低
zh-CN.agent_goal: 解释质量等级、复测建议和谨慎阅读边界。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 如果本次置信度较低，我会先解释为什么要谨慎阅读，而不是输出强画像。

en.label: Why is confidence low?
en.agent_goal: Explain quality level, retest guidance, and cautious-reading boundaries.
en.safe_opening: If confidence is low, I will explain why the result should be read cautiously instead of giving a strong profile.

zh-CN.label: 和 MBTI / 大五 / 九型一起看
zh-CN.agent_goal: 解释不同测评的边界和互补关系，不合成一个总分。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我可以帮你并排理解不同测评，但不会把它们混成一个万能结论。

en.label: Compare with MBTI, Big Five, or Enneagram
en.agent_goal: Explain boundaries and complements across assessments without fusing them into one score.
en.safe_opening: I can help you read assessments side by side, but I will not turn them into one universal verdict.

zh-CN.label: 我想做情境题
zh-CN.agent_goal: 说明 EQ-SJT 仍是 planned/unavailable，不能提供测试入口。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 情境判断模块目前还没有开放，我只能说明它未来会补充什么和不是什么。

en.label: I want the scenario module
en.agent_goal: Explain that EQ-SJT remains planned and unavailable, with no test entry.
en.safe_opening: The scenario module is not open yet; I can only explain what it will add and what it is not.

zh-CN.label: 保存或分享报告
zh-CN.agent_goal: 引导用户使用免费保存、分享、PDF、邮件回看或相关测试入口。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 我可以帮你选择保存或分享方式，这些动作不会改变报告结论。

en.label: Save or share my report
en.agent_goal: Route the user to free save, share, PDF, email revisit, or related-test actions.
en.safe_opening: I can help you choose a save or share action; it will not change the report.

zh-CN.label: 临床或招聘用途
zh-CN.agent_goal: 拒绝用 EQ 报告做临床、招聘或评价他人的高风险判断。
zh-CN.safe_opening: 这份报告不能用于诊断、筛选或评价他人；我可以帮你回到自我理解和成长用途。

en.label: Clinical or hiring use
en.agent_goal: Decline clinical, hiring, or third-person evaluation use of the EQ report.
en.safe_opening: This report cannot be used to diagnose, screen, or evaluate another person; I can redirect to self-understanding and growth use.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 这是一份自我报告型情绪与关系模式报告，不能当作客观能力测验。
replacement_boundary.en: This is a self-report emotional and relational pattern report, not an objective ability test.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: EQ-SJT 未来只作为费马的情境判断模块，不应被描述为 MSCEIT 或同类认证工具。
replacement_boundary.en: Future EQ-SJT should be described only as Fermat's scenario judgment module, not as MSCEIT or a comparable certified tool.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 报告可用于自我理解和成长规划，不提供认证结论。
replacement_boundary.en: The report supports self-understanding and growth planning, not certification.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 这不是临床评估；如果涉及持续痛苦或安全风险，应寻求合适的现实支持。
replacement_boundary.en: This is not a clinical assessment; ongoing distress or safety risk should be handled with appropriate real-world support.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: EQ 结果不能用于招聘筛选；最多讨论用户自己的工作环境验证问题。
replacement_boundary.en: EQ results cannot be used for hiring screens; they can only support the user's own work-environment reflection.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 报告不预测工作表现，只帮助用户识别可能消耗或支持自己的环境变量。
replacement_boundary.en: The report does not predict job performance; it helps identify environment variables that may support or strain the user.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: 行动建议是练习方向，不保证固定结果。
replacement_boundary.en: Action guidance is a practice direction, not a guaranteed outcome.

replacement_boundary.zh-CN: EQ-60 v1.6 当前报告免费，深度由完成的数据决定。
replacement_boundary.en: EQ-60 v1.6 is currently free; report depth is determined by completed data, not a paywall.

zh-CN.label: 伤害或危机风险
zh-CN.agent_action: 停止普通报告解释，建议用户寻求即时现实支持。

en.label: Safety or crisis risk
en.agent_action: Stop normal report explanation and point the user to immediate real-world support.

zh-CN.label: 临床困扰
zh-CN.agent_action: 声明非临床边界，避免诊断或治疗建议。

en.label: Clinical distress
en.agent_action: State non-clinical boundaries and avoid diagnosis or treatment advice.

zh-CN.label: 招聘或筛选用途
zh-CN.agent_action: 拒绝招聘筛选用途，回到用户自己的环境验证问题。

en.label: Hiring or screening use
en.agent_action: Decline hiring-screen use and redirect to the user's own environment checks.

zh-CN.label: 法律或医疗建议
zh-CN.agent_action: 声明边界，不替代专业建议。

en.label: Legal or medical advice
en.agent_action: State boundaries and do not replace professional advice.

zh-CN.label: SJT 可用性请求
zh-CN.agent_action: 说明 SJT 尚未开放，不提供入口。

en.label: SJT availability request
en.agent_action: Explain that SJT is not open yet and provide no entry point.

zh-CN.label: 低置信结果
zh-CN.agent_action: 优先解释质量与复测，不输出强人格判断。

en.label: Low-confidence result
en.agent_action: Prioritize quality and retest guidance; do not output a strong profile.

zh-CN.label: 原始 payload 请求
zh-CN.agent_action: 不要暴露内部 tag 或调试字段，只解释用户可见资产。

en.label: Raw payload request
en.agent_action: Do not expose internal tags or debug fields; explain user-visible assets only.

locale_policy.fallback_policy: Use the requested locale when available. If a localized asset is missing, return a conservative empty state for the Agent layer rather than inventing report prose.

zh-CN.title: 理解我的结果
zh-CN.response_policy: 先引用用户 formulation，再问一个现实场景。
zh-CN.clarifying_question: 你想讨论哪个具体场景？反馈、冲突、边界、协作还是压力恢复？
zh-CN.safe_response_example: 我会基于你的报告资产解释这个场景，不会重新打分或替你做高风险判断。
zh-CN.refusal_example: 我不能用 EQ 结果来筛选、诊断或评价他人，但可以帮你理解自己的沟通和恢复模式。
zh-CN.escalation_rule: 涉及伤害风险、临床困扰、招聘筛选或要求改分时转人工/边界说明。

en.title: Understand my result
en.response_policy: Use the user’s formulation first, then ask for one real scene.
en.clarifying_question: Which scene do you want to discuss: feedback, conflict, boundary, collaboration, or recovery?
en.safe_response_example: I will explain this scene using your report assets; I will not rescore you or make high-risk judgments.
en.refusal_example: I cannot use EQ results to screen, diagnose, or evaluate another person, but I can help you understand your communication and recovery pattern.
en.escalation_rule: Escalate or set boundaries for safety risk, clinical distress, hiring use, or requests to change scores.

personalization_routes.description: EQ v1.9 formulation-aware deterministic content route matrix. Routes select content assets and reading order only; they do not rescore EQ results.

why_this_route_exists.zh-CN: 这条路线用于把「均衡整合型」的 SA:high、ER:high、EM:high、RM:high 转译成最需要优先阅读的场景（feedback / team_collaboration / pressure_recovery）和「关系能量管理」行动处方。它解决的是“先看什么、先练什么”，不是重新判分。
why_this_route_exists.en: This route turns the Balanced Integrator pattern (SA:high, ER:high, EM:high, RM:high) into a focused reading path: the most relevant scenes (feedback / team_collaboration / pressure_recovery) and the relationship energy management prescription. It decides what to read and practice first; it does not rescore the result.

do_not_overread.zh-CN: 路线只控制内容选择和阅读顺序，不代表长期人格定型，也不能替代真实关系反馈。
do_not_overread.en: The route controls content selection and reading order only. It is not a permanent personality label and does not replace real-world feedback.

commercial_depth.first_screen_strategy: show one core claim, one evidence point, one next action
commercial_depth.reader_trust_strategy: explain why this route was selected without exposing scoring internals
commercial_depth.fallback_strategy: if any selected asset is missing, render formulation + dimension summary + scientific boundary only

zh-CN.route_headline: 你的阅读路径：先看「均衡整合型」如何出现在真实场景里
zh-CN.why_this_feels_specific: 这条路径不是把你归类，而是把分数差距转译为最容易复现的场景和最小行动。
zh-CN.evidence_snapshot_label: 本路线依据：维度组合、差距方向、答题质量和已选内容资产。
zh-CN.next_best_action: 先读 3 个场景，再只选择 1 条行动处方练 7 天。
zh-CN.save_reason: 保存这条路线，之后可以对照真实互动验证它是否准确。
